No. L-MISC/V1/1/2007.—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 61 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board Act, 2006 (19 of 2006), the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board hereby makes the following regulations to amend the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Natural Gas Pipeline Tariff} Regulations, 2008, namely:— 1. Short title and commencement. (1) These regulations may be called the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Natural Gas Tv y Pipeline Tariff) Amendment Regulations, 2014. (2) They shail come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette a For regulation 6 of the Petroleum and Natural Gas Regulatory Board (Determination of Natural Gas Pipeline Tariff) 4 Regulations. 2008, the following shall be substituted, namely:— “6, Miscellaneous.
